articles.title: Minnesota Wild reporter Jessi Pierce and her 3 children found dead in house fire, league says
articles.description:
“The entire NHL.com team is devastated and heartbroken by the loss of Jessi and her children,” said Bill Price, vice president and editor-in-chief of NHL.com, in a statement.

The post Minnesota Wild reporter Jessi Pierce and her 3 children found dead in house fire, league says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jessi Pierce, a Minnesota Wild reporter, and her three children died in a house fire.
The NHL community mourns the loss, expressing deep sorrow for the family.
This tragedy highlights the importance of fire safety awareness for Boston residents.

articles.title: Plymouth police officer on paid leave amid criminal investigation
articles.description:
"Violations of department policy or state law will not be tolerated," Plymouth police said after State Police launched the criminal investigation.

The post Plymouth police officer on paid leave amid criminal investigation appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Plymouth police officer placed on paid leave due to ongoing criminal investigation by State Police.
Investigation initiated following reported violations of department policy or state law.
Local residents concerned about police accountability and potential impacts on community trust.

articles.title: Meteorite crashes through roof of house near Houston
articles.description:
No one was injured, but a woman was startled on Saturday when a meteorite pierced the roof of her home, ricocheted off the floor, and struck a bedroom ceiling.

The post Meteorite crashes through roof of house near Houston appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Meteorite crashed through a woman's home near Houston on Saturday.
No injuries reported; the meteorite struck the bedroom ceiling after ricocheting.
Residents should be aware of rare meteorite incidents affecting local safety.
